name: tallcms-theme-luxury
description: A refined, premium theme using daisyUI's luxury preset — warm neutrals, deep accents, and typography-forward layouts for brands that want to feel established.
author: TallCMS
note: This theme uses the tallcms/cms package's node_modules (resolved via NODE_PATH=../../../node_modules). Run 'npm install' inside packages/tallcms/cms, not inside this theme dir.
